properties.description: Trigger the OpenOctopus equity analysis notebook for a given ticker. Results are saved to the Lakehouse equity_reports folder.

activities.name: RunAnalysisNotebook
activities.description: Run the OpenOctopus analysis notebook with the specified ticker

ticker.description: Stock ticker symbol (e.g. AAPL, MSFT, NVDA)

lakehouse_path.description: OneLake path where reports are saved
